languages.text: "Я что-нибудь придумаю. А вы — будьте готовы следовать указаниям".

traits.locale_text: "Я что-нибудь придумаю. А вы — будьте готовы следовать указаниям".

languages.text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."
languages.original_text: "Я что-нибудь придумаю. А вы — будьте готовы следовать указаниям".

traits.locale_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."
"I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."
"I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

languages.text: “我会想办法的。你先准备好，等着我的指示。”
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: “我会想办法的。你先准备好，等着我的指示。”

languages.text: « Je vais y réfléchir. De votre côté, tenez-vous prêt à suivre mes instructions. »
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais y réfléchir. De votre côté, tenez-vous prêt à suivre mes instructions. »

languages.text: "Bir şeyler düşüneceğim. Sen de hazır ol, talimatlarımı yerine getireceksin."
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: "Bir şeyler düşüneceğim. Sen de hazır ol, talimatlarımı yerine getireceksin."

languages.text: «Pensaré en algo. Usted esté preparado para seguir mis instrucciones».
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: «Pensaré en algo. Usted esté preparado para seguir mis instrucciones».

languages.text: "Ich werde mir etwas überlegen. Und Ihr haltet Euch bereit, meine Anweisungen zu befolgen."
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mir etwas überlegen. Und Ihr haltet Euch bereit, meine Anweisungen zu befolgen."

languages.text: 「何か考えよう。そして君も、私の指示に従う準備をしておけ。」
languages.original_text: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."

traits.locale_text: 「何か考えよう。そして君も、私の指示に従う準備をしておけ。」
